# The Rewild Invariant

Subtitle: `Learning How to Stop`

## Description / Excerpt

A Rewild Yourself essay on stopping-power as a living-system invariant: the rhythmic capacity to pause without collapse.

Excerpt:

There is a small, quiet truth that keeps showing up, no matter how far out you zoom. It shows up in biology. In ecology. In psychology. In economies. In bodies. In cultures. How one thing works is how everything works. The truth is this: A living system must be able to stop. Not
